mapper.select: INSERT INTO provider_credential(tenant_id,provider_channel_id,name,credential_type,masked_value,credential_fingerprint,ciphertext,initialization_vector,encryption_version,enabled,priority,weight,remark,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (#{i.tenantId},#{i.providerChannelId},#{i.name},#{i.credentialType},#{i.maskedValue},#{i.credentialFingerprint},#{i.ciphertext},#{i.initializationVector},#{i.encryptionVersion},#{i.enabled},#{i.priority},#{i.weight},#{i.remark},NOW(),NOW()) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id,provider_channel_id,credential_fingerprint) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL DO NOTHING RETURNING credential_fingerprint
SELECT FROM provider_credential WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id,tenant_id,provider_channel_id,name,credential_type,masked_value,credential_fingerprint,ciphertext,initialization_vector,encryption_version,enabled,priority,weight,remark,deleted_at,created_at,updated_at FROM provider_credential WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id,tenant_id,provider_channel_id,name,credential_type,masked_value,credential_fingerprint,ciphertext,initialization_vector,encryption_version,enabled,priority,weight,remark,deleted_at,created_at,updated_at FROM provider_credential WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND enabled=TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY priority,id LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM provider_credential WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')AND masked_value ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{maskedValue},'%')AND enabled=#{enabled} ORDER BY created_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM provider_credential WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')AND masked_value ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{maskedValue},'%')AND enabled=#{enabled}

SELECT credential_fingerprint FROM provider_credential WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND credential_fingerprint IN #{f} AND id <> #{excludeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE provider_credential SET name=#{name},enabled=#{enabled},priority=#{priority},weight=#{weight},remark=#{remark},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE provider_credential SET masked_value=#{maskedValue},credential_fingerprint=#{credentialFingerprint},ciphertext=#{ciphertext},initialization_vector=#{initializationVector},encryption_version=#{encryptionVersion},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_credential SET enabled=#{enabled},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_credential SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE enabled = TRUE) AS enabled, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE enabled = FALSE) AS disabled FROM provider_credential WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
